sections.paragraph:
- Original: προερέω

- Transliteration: Proereo

- Phonetic: pro-er-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to say before

a. to say in what precedes, to say above

b. to say before i.e. heretofore, formerly

c. to say beforehand i.e. before the event: prophecies

- Origin: from G4253 and G2046, used as alternate of G4277

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2046; used as alternate of G4277; to say already predict: - foretell say (speak tell) before.
